description_long: This is a sleek, supersonic passenger airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a long, slender fuselage. The wings are delta-shaped, smoothly blending into the body, and the tail features a single vertical stabilizer with a conventional horizontal stabilizer. The engines are mounted in pairs under the rear section of the wings, and the landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle markings, including a flag and colored accents on the tail and wingtips. The cockpit is positioned at the very front, with a streamlined, enclosed canopy and multiple windows.
description: A streamlined, white supersonic passenger airplane with a pointed nose, delta wings, and rear-mounted engines. It features a single vertical tail and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full delta wing shape, pointed nose, and overall symmetry of the airplane.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long fuselage, pointed nose, cockpit windows, landing gear, and tail design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine arrangement, delta wing span, and tail structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the fuselage, cockpit, landing gear, and tail from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing delta configuration with sharply swept leading edges and no visible winglets; wings blend smoothly into the fuselage.
attribute_engine_type: Four jet engines mounted in pairs under the rear wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers at the rear.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows integrated into the nose section.
